thesis: Revalidate earlier-window same-basket passive baselines for the cloud event baskets after repairing local daily and factor coverage for CRM/NOW/ORCL/NFLX/ADBE.

benchmark.purpose: Common market reference for earlier-window passive checks

universe.name: platform_passive_baseline_recheck_v1
universe.selection_rule: Local equal-weight passive baselines on repaired platform baskets

carry_forward_findings: Earlier-window local passive baselines were previously invalid because CRM/NOW/ORCL factor coverage only started in 2025.
Those local daily and factor files have now been backfilled to 2024-01-02.
The next step is to confirm that same-basket earlier-window passive baselines are now valid and comparable to the cloud event branch.

candidates.hypothesis: VOO remains the common market passive reference for 2024.
Platform7 passive 2024 should now be a valid same-basket baseline after local data repair.
Platform5 passive 2024 should now be a valid same-basket baseline after local data repair.
Platform7 passive 2024_2025 should now be a valid extended same-basket baseline after local data repair.
Platform5 passive 2024_2025 should now be a valid extended same-basket baseline after local data repair.
